name: Quick Water - Ocean FX
description: Create realistic oceans, waves, pools, baths, fountains and small water surfaces with a clean Blender workflow.
schemaDescription: Blender addon for oceans, waves, pools, baths, fountains and small water surfaces.

name: HDRI Sky Pro
description: Browse HDRI previews inside Blender, create worlds and skies, and combine HDRI lighting with cloud presets.
schemaDescription: Blender addon for HDRI previews, world creation and HDRI lighting workflows.

name: Quick Sky Pro
description: Use animated cloud presets, wind controls and cloud layers to build atmospheric Blender skies faster.
schemaDescription: Blender addon for animated cloud presets, atmospheric skies and cloud layer controls.
